coll: 3x1 (3); Quire 1, four single-folios with stubs: 4x1 (7) plus five singletons: 5x1 (12); Quire 2: 1x4 (16) plus 1 singleton (17); Quire 3, bifolio encompassing 8 single-folios: 8x1 inserted in 1x2 (27); Quire 4, bifolio encompassing 10 single-folios: 10x1 inserted in 1x2 (39) plus four singletons: 4x1 (43); Quire 5, 3 single-folios with stubs: 3x1 (46); 3 singletons: 3x1 (49); Quire 6, 1 bifolio encompassing, from outside in, 2 single-folios with stubs, 2 bifolios, 2 single-folios with stubs: 1x2, 2x1, 2x2, 2x1 (59); Quire 7: 2x2, 2x1, 1x2 (67); 1x2 (69)

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
